title: ADP Demonstrates Exceptional Workplace Equality with 13th Perfect Score
text: ROSELAND, N.J., Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- ADP, a leading global technology company providing human capital management (HCM) solutions, has received its 13th consecutive 100 percent rating in the Human Rights Campaign Foundation's (HRC) annual Corporate Equality Index (CEI), strengthening its designation as a Best Place to Work for LGBTQ+ Equality.

title: ADP Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2022 Results
text: ROSELAND, N.J., Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a leading global technology company providing human capital management (HCM) solutions, today announced its second quarter fiscal 2022 financial results along with its revised fiscal 2022 outlook through an earnings release available on the company's website at investors.adp.com/events-and-presentations.

title: After Plunging 11.4% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for ADP (ADP)
text: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for ADP (ADP) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

title: Here's Why ADP (ADP) Looks Ripe for Bottom Fishing
text: After losing some value lately, a hammer chart pattern has been formed for ADP (ADP), indicating that the stock has found support. This, combined with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions, could lead to a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
